zh.lifeSummary: 當Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort'於1030年出生在法國奧維阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特時，他的父親Archambaud 'le Jeune' de Bourbon III34歲，母親Beletrud De Sully31歲。他和Beliarde d'Auvergne至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1095年9月22日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特享年65歲，埋葬在法國奧維阿利也勒 蒙特特。

variants.name: Dey

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BOURBON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from a village in Allier, the site of the (now ruined) castle of Bourbon, or from another place called (Le) Bourbon, mainly in the southern part of France. The placename is derived from a Celtic and pre-Celtic element borb- denoting a hot spring.

History: The progenitor of a large part of the American bearers of the surname Bourbon was Jean-Pierre Bourbon from Salins-les-Bains in Jura, France, who settled in MO in the middle of the 19th century. However, many bearers of the surname claim a connection with the house of Bourbon, which provided generations of monarchs of France and Spain and other European royalty. It takes its name from the castle of Bourbon in Allier, which was held by Adhémar, a 9th-century noble. His descendant Beatrice, heiress of Bourbon, married Robert of Clermont, 6th son of King Louis IX of France, in 1272, and these two are considered founders of the royal house. Robert's son Louis was created Duke of Bourbon in 1327. By the 16th century they had added much of southern France, the dukedom of Vendôme, and the kingdom of Navarre to their fiefs, and in 1589 a Bourbon succeeded to the throne of France as Henry IV. His grandson, Louis XIV, called ‘the Sun King’, reigned 1643–1715, presiding over a golden age of French literature and art and attempting to establish French supremacy in Europe. The Bourbons ruled France until the Revolution in 1793 and again 1815–48. The present claimants to the French throne are descended from Louis XIV's brother, Philippe, Duke of Orléans. The Bourbons acquired the Spanish throne in 1700, when a grandson of Louis XIV succeeded as Philip V; they ruled until 1931 and were restored, in the person of King Juan Carlos, in 1975. The Bourbon kings of the Two Sicilies (i.e. Sicily and Naples), 1759–1861, and Bourbon dukes of Parma, 1748–1860, were descended from the Spanish branch of the family.

variants.name: Borbon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ana, Jesus, Marta, Miguel Angel, Tomas, Ademar, Alfredo, Ana Maria, Bernabe, Berta, Carlos.

en.lifeSummary: When Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort' was born in 1030, in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, France, his father, Archambaud 'le Jeune' de Bourbon III, was 34 and his mother, Beletrud De Sully, was 31. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Beliarde d'Auvergne. He died on 22 September 1095, in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 65, and was buried in Le Montet, Allier, Auvergne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort' est né en 1030, à Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, France, son père, Archambaud 'le Jeune' de Bourbon III, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Beletrud De Sully, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Beliarde d'Auvergne. Il est décédé le 22 septembre 1095, à Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Le Montet, Allier, Auvergne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort' 1030 in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Archambaud 'le Jeune' de Bourbon III 34 und seine Mutter Beletrud De Sully 31. Er hatte mit Beliarde d'Auvergne mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. September 1095 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Le Montet, Allier, Auvergne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort' è nato il nel 1030 nel Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, Francia, il suo padre, Archambaud 'le Jeune' de Bourbon III, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Beletrud De Sully, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Beliarde d'Auvergne. Morì il 22 settembre 1095, nel Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Le Montet, Allier, Auvergne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort'が1030年にフランスアウバーグンアリールボウルボン-ル'アルチャンバウルトで生まれた時，父Archambaud 'le Jeune' de Bourbon IIIは34歳，母Beletrud De Sullyは31歳であった。彼はBeliarde d'Auvergneとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1095年9月22日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスアリールボウルボン-ル'アルチャンバウルトで65歳で死去し，フランスアウバーグンアリールル モンテトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort'(이)가 1030년 프랑스 오버그니 앨리어 부르보-'아르챔바트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Archambaud 'le Jeune' de Bourbon III(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Beletrud De Sully(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Beliarde d'Auvergne(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1095년 9월 22일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 앨리어 부르보-'아르챔바트에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 오버그니 앨리어 일 몽트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort' nasceu em 1030, em Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, França, seu pai, Archambaud 'le Jeune' de Bourbon III, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Beletrud De Sully, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Beliarde d'Auvergne. Ele faleceu em 22 de setembro de 1095, em Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Le Montet, Allier, Auvergne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort' родился в 1030 г. в местности бурбон-л'арчамбаулт, аллиир, аувиргн, Франция, его отцу по имени Archambaud 'le Jeune' de Bourbon III было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Beletrud De Sully, 31. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Beliarde d'Auvergne. Он умер 22 сентября 1095 г. в местности бурбон-л'арчамбаулт, аллиир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности л монтет, аллиир, аувиргн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort' nació en 1030, en Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, Francia, su papá, Archambaud 'le Jeune' de Bourbon III, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Beletrud De Sully, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Beliarde d'Auvergne. Murió el 22 de septiembre de 1095, en Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Le Montet, Allier, Auvergne, Francia.
